location.origin: Bellingham, Washington. Death Cab for Cutie formed in Bellingham. The acoustic context captures the stripped-down performances that reveal the folk bones beneath the indie rock production.
location.formative: Bellingham / Seattle. Death Cab's acoustic context draws from KEXP acoustic sessions, Forbidden Love EP acoustic tracks, and unplugged performances throughout the PNW.
location.career: Death Cab for Cutie (acoustic context): stripped-down performances. KEXP acoustic sessions, Forbidden Love EP acoustic tracks, unplugged and festival acoustic sets. Fourth Death Cab appearance in the engine (58 band, 60 Gibbard solo, 67 Walla departed, 82 acoustic). E=3.

labels: Barsuk Records (SIXTH Barsuk artist in engine after Laura Gibson 57, Death Cab 58, Long Winters 59, Jesse Sykes 64, Mates of State 80; Death Cab appears twice on Barsuk: 58 and 82)

members.name: Ben Gibbard
members.note: In acoustic context, Gibbard's voice and guitar/piano are the primary instruments. The production is stripped away. What remains is the songwriter.

members.name: Nick Harmer
members.note: In acoustic context, bass is often acoustic or absent entirely.

former_members.name: Chris Walla
former_members.note: Degree 67. Walla shaped the studio production that the acoustic context removes. Without Walla's production, the acoustic skeleton is exposed.

associated_musicians.name: Death Cab for Cutie (band)
associated_musicians.note: Indie Rock at E=3. The ache. Full production. Degree 82 strips the production away.

associated_musicians.name: Ben Gibbard (solo)
associated_musicians.note: Singer-Songwriter at E=2. The solo voice. Gibbard entirely alone. Three points on the same spectrum.

associated_musicians.name: Chris Walla (departed)
associated_musicians.note: Post-Punk at E=3. The producer's departure. Walla shaped the studio sound that degree 82 removes.

associated_musicians.name: The Long Winters
associated_musicians.note: Both on Barsuk. Power pop at E=4 vs. acoustic folk at E=3.

associated_musicians.name: Jesse Sykes
associated_musicians.note: Both on Barsuk. Dark folk at E=2 vs. acoustic indie folk at E=3.

theory_nodes.concept: Acoustic intimacy (eighty-third acoustic element -- the sound that emerges when a full-band arrangement is stripped to its acoustic skeleton; acoustic guitar and piano replace electric instruments; voice moves forward; the room becomes audible; closer, quieter, more intimate)
examples: Death Cab for Cutie acoustic context (degree 82) -- stripped-down KEXP sessions, Forbidden Love EP acoustic tracks. The ache becomes a whisper.
Contrast with the Broadway voice (degree 81, Sara Bareilles) -- warm vocal power filling a theater. Acoustic intimacy fills a room.
Contrast with the organ explosion (degree 80, Mates of State) -- dense keyboard brightness. Acoustic intimacy is sparse guitar darkness.
Contrast with the ache (degree 58, Death Cab band) -- same songs, full production. Acoustic intimacy reveals the skeleton beneath the production.
theory_nodes.description: Acoustic intimacy is the eighty-third acoustic element. Full-band stripped to acoustic skeleton. Guitar, piano, voice. Closer, quieter, more intimate. The room becomes audible.

ancestors: The Broadway voice (degree 81, Sara Bareilles) -- theater-scale vocal warmth. Acoustic intimacy is room-scale vocal presence.
The organ explosion (degree 80, Mates of State) -- dense keyboard brightness. Acoustic intimacy is sparse guitar darkness.
genealogy.relationship: Eighty-three acoustic elements across eighty-three degrees. Acoustic intimacy follows the Broadway voice -- from theater to living room. Track element 84 at degree 83.

theory_nodes.concept: The recursive return (eighty-third artist-city pattern -- an artist appearing in the engine multiple times in different contexts, each revealing a different dimension; Death Cab at 58 band, 60 solo, 67 departed, 82 acoustic; four entries, four windows, one house)
examples: Death Cab for Cutie (degree 82, acoustic) -- fourth appearance. Each context reveals a new dimension.
58: the band (full production). 60: the songwriter (solo). 67: the producer (departed). 82: the skeleton (acoustic).
The recursive return is not repetition -- it is depth. Four windows into the same house.
theory_nodes.description: The recursive return is the eighty-third artist-city pattern. Same artist in multiple contexts. Four Death Cab entries. Depth through recursion.

ancestors: The crossover arc (degree 81, Sara Bareilles) -- one artist in multiple genres. The recursive return is one artist in multiple contexts.
The married duo (degree 80, Mates of State) -- collaboration within one context. The recursive return is exploration across contexts.
genealogy.relationship: Eighty-three artist-city patterns across eighty-three degrees. Track pattern 84 at degree 83.

theory_nodes.concept: Indie Folk at Genre Stage 64 -- same songs, different genre; Indie Rock becomes Indie Folk when electric instruments are removed; genre as function of instrumentation context; reduction to essence reveals folk bones
examples: Death Cab acoustic (degree 82) -- Indie Folk. Genre Stage 64. Same songs as degree 58 (Indie Rock) but acoustic context shifts the genre.
The observation: the same artist can occupy different genre classifications depending on performance context.
Acoustic guitar and piano replace electric guitars and drum kit. The genre shifts from rock to folk. The songs remain.
theory_nodes.description: Indie Folk at degree 82 establishes Genre Stage 64. Genre as function of context. Same songs, different classification when stripped to acoustic.

ancestors: Pop/Soul at degree 81 (Sara Bareilles). Genre Stage 64 at degree 82.
Indie Rock at degree 58 (Death Cab band). Same band, different genre through acoustic context.
genealogy.relationship: Genre Stage 64 at degree 82. Track genre at degree 83.

theory_nodes.concept: E=3 at degree 82 -- twenty-first E=3 deployment; distribution 3:29:21:19:11:2; acoustic context reduces energy from band level; same E=3 as band (58) but for different reasons -- band E=3 is controlled precision, acoustic E=3 is intimate reduction
examples: Death Cab acoustic (degree 82) -- E=3. The energy of acoustic intimacy.
Same E=3 as the band at degree 58, but different source: band E=3 is controlled precision, acoustic E=3 is intimate reduction.
E=3 rises to 21. Distribution: E1:3, E2:29, E3:21, E4:19, E5:11, E6:2. Total: 85.
theory_nodes.description: E=3 at degree 82 is the twenty-first E=3 deployment. Distribution: 3:29:21:19:11:2. Acoustic intimacy energy.

ancestors: E=4 at degree 81 (Sara Bareilles). E=3 drops one step -- from Broadway power to acoustic intimacy.
E=3 at degree 58 (Death Cab band). Same numerical level, different acoustic source.
genealogy.relationship: Twenty-one E=3 deployments across eighty-three degrees. Track at degree 83.

theory_nodes.concept: Barsuk Records sixth artist -- Laura Gibson (57), Death Cab (58), Long Winters (59), Jesse Sykes (64), Mates of State (80), Death Cab acoustic (82); most represented label; Death Cab appears twice; extends lead
examples: Death Cab acoustic (degree 82) -- Barsuk Records. Sixth Barsuk artist.
Death Cab appears twice on Barsuk: 58 (band) and 82 (acoustic). Only artist with multiple Barsuk entries.
Barsuk roster: 57, 58, 59, 64, 80, 82. Six entries across 26 degrees.
theory_nodes.description: Barsuk Records' sixth artist at degree 82. Most represented label. Death Cab appears twice. Extends lead.

ancestors: Mates of State at degree 80 (fifth Barsuk). Death Cab acoustic is sixth.
Death Cab at degree 58 (first Barsuk Death Cab entry).
genealogy.relationship: Six Barsuk artists across 26 degrees (57-82). Track at future Barsuk appearances.

cross_references.relationship: Original band entry. Indie Rock at E=3. The ache. Full production. Degree 82 strips the production away. The ache remains but becomes a whisper.
Solo entry. Singer-Songwriter at E=2. The solo voice. If 58 is the band and 82 is the acoustic band, 60 is Gibbard entirely alone. Three points on the same spectrum.
Departed member. Post-Punk at E=3. Walla shaped the studio production that degree 82 removes. Without Walla's production, the acoustic skeleton is exposed.
Barsuk connection. Both on Barsuk. Long Winters is guitar-based power pop at E=4. Death Cab acoustic is guitar-based folk at E=3. Barsuk's acoustic dimension.
Barsuk connection. Both on Barsuk. Sykes is dark folk at E=2. Death Cab acoustic is indie folk at E=3. Barsuk's folk spectrum: dark to intimate.
